name: telemetry-logs
description: Structured logging surface. Wraps Monolog with a processor pipeline that emits JSON log records with every field the observability backend needs: timestamp, level, message, exception, workspace_id, workspace_id, request_id, trace_id (from telemetry-otel), span_id, causer_id, user_id, correlation_id, source_module, source_class, environment, service.name, service.version. Attribute-driven per-module context enrichers via `#[AsLogContext]`. Sink-agnostic — config chooses Loki / DataDog / stdout / files. Every log line correlates to spans emitted by telemetry-otel for one-click trace-to-logs navigation.
extends_note: Optional dep. When telemetry-otel is present, trace_id + span_id are automatically added to every log record. When absent, those keys are omitted.

processor_pipeline.name: PsrLogMessageProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: Standard Monolog processor. Handles PSR-3 interpolation.

processor_pipeline.name: IntrospectionProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: Adds source class + line + function to every record.

processor_pipeline.name: AcademorixContextProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: Injects academorix.request_id, academorix.workspace_id, academorix.workspace_id, academorix.causer_id from RequestContext.

processor_pipeline.name: OtelTraceContextProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: When telemetry-otel active: adds trace_id + span_id from current OTel context. Enables trace-to-logs jump in Grafana / DataDog.

processor_pipeline.name: ModuleContextProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: Runs the compiled LogContextRegistry — evaluates every #[AsLogContext] enricher registered for the current call site.

processor_pipeline.name: RedactorProcessor
processor_pipeline.purpose: Applies redaction rules to record fields. Same rules as telemetry-otel.redact.* by convention. Class-level attributes #[RedactedForLogs] mark specific fields.

processor_pipeline.name: JsonFormatter
processor_pipeline.purpose: Serialises to newline-delimited JSON. Loki, Grafana Alloy, DataDog agent all consume this.
